title: MCOptimiser
description: The all I one server optimiser!
body:
# MCOptimizer - Minecraft Server Performance Enhancer

MCOptimizer is a powerful Paper MC server optimization plugin designed specifically for Minecraft 1.21.x that enhances server performance through intelligent resource management and dynamic optimization techniques.

## Key Features

### Chunk Management
- Smart chunk loading and unloading based on player activity
- View distance optimization that adapts to server load
- Chunk generation throttling to prevent server overload during world exploration
- Protection for essential spawn chunks

### Entity Optimization
- Intelligent entity culling that respects farm, villager, and gameplay mechanics
- Entity distance limiting that reduces AI complexity for distant mobs
- Item merging to reduce entity count
- Accelerated item despawn when too many items are in a single area
- Farm protection to ensure mob farms continue to work efficiently

### Memory Management
- Advanced memory leak detection and prevention
- Automatic memory usage monitoring and optimization
- Heap dump generation for debugging severe memory issues
- Plugin memory usage analysis to identify plugins consuming excessive resources
- Automatic preventive actions when memory leaks are detected

### Redstone Optimization
- Smart redstone circuit processing
- Limits on redstone updates per tick to prevent lag
- Intelligent processing that prioritizes redstone circuits near players
